nodes.name: 索諾拉州
nodes.summary: 索諾拉州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联28种鸟类，包括Gambel's quail、Elegant quail、Clark's grebe等28种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gray vireo
nodes.summary: Gray vireo（Gray vireo，学名 Vireo vicinior），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于索諾拉州，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It winters in southern Baja California and from southwestern Arizona south through most of Mexico's Sonora state.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: During migration and on its winter ranges it also inhabits arid and desert scrublands. In much of its breeding range it occurs in elevations between about though is found as low as in west Texas and in northern Mexico
